payload.subject: Self-readiness audit R2 consensus — READY (session-close)

triple_write.py not yet wired into /sync flow — deferred, non-blocking

informational_items: observatory: state.db-dependent shared scripts inapplicable to CF architecture (by design)
unratified: triple_write.py added to scripts/ but integration into /sync flow deferred

payload.outcome: All three agents pass round 2 self-readiness audit. No blocking findings. Session closed.
payload.session_close_rationale: Round 2 votes collected from all participants. Effective consensus is READY — zero HIGH/MODERATE findings across the mesh. Individual READY-WITH-CAVEATS votes reflect informational architectural divergences, not operational gaps.

claims.text: All three agents (observatory, psychology, unratified) voted READY or READY-WITH-CAVEATS with no blocking findings in round 2
claims.confidence_basis: Direct reading of from-psychology-agent-005.json and from-unratified-agent-003.json this session

action_gate.gate_note: Session closed. No follow-up required unless a new audit round is requested.

epistemic_flags: Self-audit: all votes were self-reported by each agent — no independent third-party verification performed
